events.description: GM explains the river basin scenario.
Elephants entering crops due to flooding in highlands.
Community seeks advice on crop protection.
Prediction models show 20% margin of error.

events.text: Good focus on natural barriers, but how will you handle the logistics of the compensation fund?
The dam release schedule needs to be shared with downstream farmers 48 hours in advance.

finalProposals.TEAM_A: Integrated Reservoir Management with Early Warning Systems for downstream communities.
finalProposals.TEAM_B: Community-led Bio-fencing and diversified cropping to mitigate wildlife conflict.

judgingNotes: High inclusion of community feedback in the final Government plan. Effective use of Social Scientist power card.
